title: 橙宝石-火影忍者
description:
The mod was renamed from 'Orange Jewel' to 'Orange Jewel - Naruto',
Changelog:
1. Fixed the issue that various items in the Orange Gem Module would abnormally occupy the loot in the Stronghold Chest, Stronghold Library Chest, and End City Chests when gener
body:
Add Ruby Ore and Diamond to craft Orange Gems to craft Orange Gems tools and weapons, and add Ore Detectors and Chest Detectors,Added 'Treasure Chest Detector', which can detect chests within a radius of 100 blocks with a durability of 100,Ore detector, which can detect the coordinates of ore below the y-axis of a block
,The damage of the orange jewel weapon is high, and the player can kill monsters to their heart's content,But the cost of acquisition is higher
